name: Chili Rotel Style
recipeIngredient: 2 can RTEL Dice Tomatoes with Green Chilies (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook ground beef, onion, and pepper in a large stock pot until the meat is browned.
2. Drain excess drippings.
3. Add remaining ingredients; cover and simmer for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Makes 8 servings.
